discoveries: import must come BEFORE module docblock (/-! ... -/) in Lean 4 — docblock goes AFTER imports
INT16_MIN/INT16_MAX defined as Lean defs need 'simp only [INT16_MIN, INT16_MAX]' before omega can reason about concrete values
constrain_mono already exists in MathFunctions.lean — use it directly for derived targets
prefix is a reserved keyword in Lean 4 — cannot use as parameter name; use pfx/sfx
CRC-32 is LSBIT-first (reflected): use >>> right-shift, check LSB with &&& 1; contrast with CRC-16 which is MSBIT-first with <<< left-shift
FVSquad.lean must explicitly import new files — auto-discovery does NOT happen; add import FVSquad.ConstrainToInt16
Rat.le_of_lt WORKS for Rat; axiom declarations cleaner than sorry for unverifiable-without-Mathlib theorems
Int.add_emod_right : (a + b) % b = a % b — direct periodicity lemma
CRC16_OUTPUT_XOR = 0x0000 in crc.h — crc16_signature is a pure foldl
Route B tests: Python % is Euclidean (same as Lean Int.emod for n > 0)
wrap_bin bug: bin + n < 0 iff bin <= -n-1; for typical n=36, need bin <= -37
isInRange: uses Bool.and_eq_true + decide_eq_true_eq for iff; omega for all arithmetic; Bool.eq_false_iff for False direction
by_contra is unavailable without Mathlib in Lean 4.29; use by_cases + omega as substitute for contradiction-based reasoning
abbrev (not def) for named constants makes them transparent to omega; def constants are opaque
simp only [if_pos h1, if_neg h2] works for case-splitting on if-then-else in goals after by_cases on the condition
notes: Run 78: ConstrainToInt16.lean proved (14 theorems, 0 sorry). crc64_add_word at phase 2 (informal spec). Next: crc64 Lean spec (Task 3), or paper update (Task 11, very stale since run54).
